channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pothole near junction, 3rd March
item.description:
On Gloucester Place, just before the junction with Fairview Road, Cheltenham.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fairview Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard in the middle of Tewkesbury Road, Cheltenham is leaning at 45 degtees, 3rd March
item.description:
At the junction of Poole Way Two of the four fixing bolts aren’t connected to the base of the bollard
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 410, High Street, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Complete bollard is damaged (Non illuminating bollard or post)

item.title: Sign misaligned on street light column 38 Bath Road, Cheltenham, 3rd March
item.description:
The sign giving direction to Mead Road Industrial Estate has been turned around the column by 90 degrees. It should face north down Bath Road, pointing towards the nearby roundabout

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 232, Bath Road, Naunton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Light out on No entry sign 110656, 3rd March
item.description:
At the junction of St Philip’s Street and Norwood Road, Cheltenham

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Saint Phillip's Street, Tivoli, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unavoidable potholes on left lane, 2nd March
item.description:
Left lane at the start of the duel carriageway just at the brow of the hill
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Small but deep pothole on centre white line, 2nd March
item.description:
There is a pot hole on centre white line as the dual carriageway comes to an end. Quite dangerous for cars starting to merge back in. On A40 heading towards Cheltenham
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large collection of potholes - not fixed - just blown 2 tyres, 2nd March
item.description:
Opposite 41/43 Whittington Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Big pothole on approach to Robert Burns Ave., 2nd March
item.description:
More large potholes with loose stones in. Deep, enough to damage wheels and cause a cyclist to fall off. Dangerous along the whole of Whittington Road to from the A40 to Robert Burns Ave and very surprised there has not already been a serious injury and damage to vehicles or another road traffic incident.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: ! Large and lots of potholes on this stretch of road, 2nd March
item.description:
Middle of the road by no. 6 Whittington Rd. Large pothole that will both cause damage to cars and cause cyclist to fall off their bike if they were to hit it. There is lots of debris that could cause injuries to passes by or parked vehicles if flicked up by a passing car.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in pavement on Kayte Lane outside Field House, 2nd March
item.description:
The potholes are outside Field House on Kayte Lane. Field House is opposite 5 Kayte Lane. Although there is paint around the potholes, this was done a long time ago and other potholes on the pavements nearby with paint around have been repaired, so I’m concerned this got missed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kayte Lane, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely large and deep pot hole, multiple along this road, 2nd March
item.description:
Outside of no. 38 Whittington Rd in the middle of the road there is a very large pot hole. If I hit this on by bicycle I will come off as it is larger than my wheel. When it is wet along this road it is impossible to tell where the very many potholes are and it is very dangerous for road users, also for pedestrians as there are rocks from the damage that are flicked up by cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40, Whittington Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole in road hit, 2nd March
item.description:
On road towards Gloucestershire airport just before turn off to The Reddings. My O/S rear alloy is buckled which is causing air to seep out of tyre.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Badgeworth Road, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large sharp edge pot hole left hand side of road just after the railway bridge as if going towards Winchcombe direction, 2nd March
item.description:
Far left hand side past the railway bridge towards in gretton heading towards Winchcombe direction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gretton, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of dead branches from trees/bushes just left hanging over, 2nd March
item.description:
Its in Hitchlands drive cul d sac also lots of damage to fencing/gate that i thought belonged to the council but i rang them and they told me to report everything to you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Hitchlands Drive, Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes here could cause serious damage to a vehicle, 2nd March
item.description:
Some very deep potholes on this area of road. Multiple holes in road one after the other. Road is very uneven
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Street, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: There are multiple potholes along Brookfield Road. It’s terrible. Cars have to swerve to miss them, 2nd March
item.description:
All along Brookfield Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34,36, Brookfield Road, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes on the side of the rd between the entrance to the golf course and the house on the corner of A446., 2nd March
item.description:
The side of this road has multiple hazardous potholes. Speeding traffic on a country road and drivers trying to avoid potholes causes dangerous driving conditions. This road needs to be repaired urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ullenwood Manor Lane, Coberley, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubble and gravel left after pot hole repair, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole has been repaired but all of the gravel and rubble from the hole has been left
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Court Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 50cm wide very deep. Someone has put a cone in it now., 2nd March
item.description:
Causing major problems on corner. Likely to cause an accident due to where it is. People are avoiding it and pulling out around it on a very tight country rd.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): B4070, Coberley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 2nd March
item.description:
Pothole in the road
Report on FixMyStreet
